cab.declassify_on: NA to AEA portions, see source list for NSI portions

paragraphs.text:
ANNEX I ARMIES AVAILABLE BY MILITARY DISTRICT   
Baltic MD - 11 Guards Army - 4 Motorized Rifle Divisions   
Belorussian MD - 28th Army - 3 Motorized Rifle Divisions 1 Tank Division 5th Guards Tank Army - 3 Tank Divisions 7th Tank Army - 3 Tank Divisions, 1 Motorized Rifle   
Carpathian MD - 8th Tank Army - 3 Tank Divisions 13th Army - 3 Motorized Rifle Divisions 38th Army - 4 Motorized Rifle Divisions   
Kiev MD - U/i Tank Army - 1 Motorized Rifle, 2 Tank and 1 Heavy Tank Division U/i Tank Army (Dnepropetrovsk) 4 Tank Divisions
Odessa MD - 14th Army - 4 Motorized Rifle Divisions
Northern Group of Forces - 2 Tank Divisions
Southern Group of Forces - 2 Tank and 2 Motorized Rifle Divisions

Group of Soviet Forces, Germany - 1 Guards Tank Army - 4 Tank and 1 Motorized Rifle 2nd Guards Army - 1 Tank & 2 Mtz Rifle 3rd Shock Army - 4 Tank & 1 Mtz Rifle 8th Guards Army - 3 Mtz & 1 Tk Division 20th Guards Army - 3 Mtz Rifle Divisions
